title: RCR PowerPoint Presentation
content: PowerPoint resource on Responsible Conduct of Research that Morgan State posts as a self-study and classroom reference for the RCR core areas — including data management, authorship, peer review, mentoring, conflicts of interest, collaborative research, falsification/fabrication, and intellectual property. Listed on the ORA RCR page as 'RCR PowerPoint Presentation' (direct file URL not exposed on the page; the RCR page itself is the canonical source).
